test-description: Verify that visited links are recorded.
Verify that the correct link is recorded after a server redirect.
Verify that double-clicking on a history link causes it to be launched in a browser window.
Change the History View to Group by Day|Site|None
Verify that columns are resizable to show/hide more of entries
Verify that things that aren't supposed to be added to history aren't (eg chorme:/// url's)
Don't ever show 302 redirects in history
Verify correct recently visited sites are in go menu.
Verify recently visited sites are in Back and Forward button dropdown menu and work.
Verify browser goes back and forward to recently visited sites
Verify browser goes back and forward correctly from page with frames.
Verify that a new session is started with a new browser window or a restart.

test-description: Verify browser goes back and forward correctly from sites that use named anchors
Verify that browser remembers scroll state when returning to pages in SH
